2605.30334.title: Demystifying Data Organization for Enhanced LLM Training
2605.30334.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized various fields, yet their training efficiency is heavily reliant on effective data curation. While data selection has been widely studied, the strategic data organization for enhanced training remains an underexplored area, particularly since current LLMs are often trained for only one or a few epochs. This paper systematically explores the influence of data organization on LLM training by reusing pre-computed sample-level scores originally generated for data efficiency, thereby incurring minimal additional computational overhead. We identify and formalize four key guidelines for optimizing data organization: Boundary Sharpening, Cyclic Scheduling, Curriculum Continuity, and Local Diversity. Guided by them, we introduce two novel data ordering methods termed STR and SAW. Extensive experiments across different model scales and data sizes, encompassing both pre-training and SFT stages, validate the effectiveness of our summarized guidelines. They also demonstrate the robustness of our proposed data ordering methods in enhancing the stability and performance of LLM training. Github Link: https://github.com/microsoft/data-efficacy/
2605.30334.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已經革新了各個領域，但它們的訓練效率在很大程度上依賴於有效的數據策劃。<lb/>雖然數據選擇已被廣泛研究，但為了增強訓練而進行的戰略性數據組織仍然是一個未被充分探索的領域，特別是因為當前的LLMs通常只訓練一個或幾個時期。<lb/>本文系統地探討了數據組織對LLM訓練的影響，通過重用最初為數據效率生成的預計算樣本級分數，從而產生最小的額外計算開銷。<lb/>我們確定並正式化了四個優化數據組織的關鍵指南：邊界銳化、循環調度、課程連貫性和局部多樣性。<lb/>在這些指導下，我們引入了兩種新穎的數據排序方法，稱為STR和SAW。<lb/>在不同模型規模和數據大小的廣泛實驗中，包括預訓練和SFT階段，驗證了我們總結的指南的有效性。<lb/>它們還展示了我們提出的數據排序方法在增強LLM訓練的穩定性和性能方面的穩健性。<lb/>Github連結：https://github.com/microsoft/data-efficacy/
2605.30334.author: Yalun Dai et.al.
2605.30334.authors: Yalun Dai, Yangyu Huang, Tongshen Yang, Yonghan Wang, Xin Zhang, Wenshan Wu, Qihao Zhao, Hao Li, Yuanyuan Gao, Kim-Hui Yap, Scarlett Li
